title: Stone Age mystery: Ancient tomb reveals a society wiped out by disease and crisis
description: Ancient DNA from a French tomb reveals a vanished Stone Age society, linking disease, crisis, and population replacement across Europe.

title: Archaeology breakthrough as experts find something baffling next to 1,600-year-old mummy
description: The discovery is a major first for ancient Egyptian scientists.

title: Colombia hosts talks on exiting fossil fuels as global energy crisis deepens
description: A gathering in Colombia reflects mounting impatience with the slow pace of global climate negotiations. Countries first agreed at COP28 in Dubai in 2023 to “transition away from fossil fuels,” but made little progress on it.

title: Ancient DNA Sheds Light on Neanderthal Community - usthadian.com
description: Ancient DNA Sheds Light on Neanderthal Community usthadian.com Ancient DNA Reveals Hidden Neanderthal Group GK Today 80,000-year-old DNA from Stajnia Cave reveals the oldest Neanderthal group in Central-Eastern Europe The Times of India News - Mitochondrial DNA Links Neanderthals in Poland’s Stajnia Cave Archaeology Magazine A closer genetic relationship than previously thought is shown by DNA study of Neanderthal teeth. vocal.media

title: Madhu Shrawani Festival: Ancient Traditions Fading in Mithila
description: In the vibrant tapestry of Mithila, the festive spirit of Madhu Shrawani once echoed the joys of community and nature. However, as modernization sweeps through the region and migration pulls families apart, these treasured rituals are quietly disappearing. Today, young individuals find themselves increasingly distanced from these ancestral customs.
